scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web,desk "npm run dev -w @desk-framework/server" "npm run dev -w @desk-framework/web" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 http://localhost:3100/api/health && WEB_DEV=1 npm run dev -w @desk-framework/desk"
scripts.build:server: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w @desk-framework/server
scripts.build:server:embed: npm run build:shared && npm run build:embed -w @desk-framework/server
scripts.build:web: npm run build:shared && npm run build -w @desk-framework/web
scripts.build:web:zip: npm run build:shared && npm run build:zip -w @desk-framework/web
scripts.package: npm run build:server:embed && npm run build:web:zip && npm run fetch-frontend -w @desk-framework/desk -- --local ../web/dist --output frontend-dist && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false npm run build:desk && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false npm run package -w @desk-framework/desk
scripts.package:local: npm run build:server:embed && npm run build:web:zip && npm run fetch-frontend -w @desk-framework/desk -- --local ../web/dist --output frontend-dist && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false ELECTRON_LOCAL_PACKAGE=1 npm run build:desk && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false ELECTRON_LOCAL_PACKAGE=1 npm run package -w @desk-framework/desk
